name: Dyer's Private Journal Page
plantWindow: Session 2 Act I (found near the mountains)
payoffWindow: Session 2 Act II (it describes what they're now seeing)
content: A page from Dyer's private journal — not the published account — is discovered among the expedition's cargo or at a camp site. Someone slipped it in: Danforth, a sympathetic colleague, or perhaps Dyer himself as a last desperate warning. The page describes something the players are about to see, or have just begun to see. It is the warning they cannot ignore — and the proof that Dyer saw truly, that his account was not madness but testimony.
notes: The PROPHET-PARADOX made physical. Dyer wrote to prevent this expedition. His writing made it possible. Every time Dyer is proven right, the warning becomes more urgent — and more futile.
